title: WiSHINE Programme
text:
WiSHINE Programme - SupportGoWhere
WiSHINE Programme
Share link
This programme seeks to support widows and their children who are in bereavement, especially in the widow’s initial adjustment to widowhood. It also supports widows who have relapsed into their grief and have difficulty coping with grief and have weak social support.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Centre-based
Free
Referral not required
SERVICE PROVIDERS
Find service providers near you
Collapse all sections
About this support

There are 5 core services for Widows: 

a) 1-1 Grief Counselling  

b) Peer support groups known as Care and Connect Groups 

c) Mentoring known as Rebuild and Shine 

d) WiShine Befriending 

e) Information & Referral  




There are 4 core services for the Fatherless: 

a) Grief Counselling 

b) Integrated Talk & Arts Therapy 

c) Peer support group for children below 13 years old known as RAINBOWS 

d) Peer support group for children 13 years old and above known as Upper Room

Who is this for?

Widows and their children with bereavement issues who require social and emotional support.

What to expect?

a) Contact the centre to sign up for the programme. 

b) The centre will contact you to confirm your registration.

How to apply?

You may call 6354 1941 or email wishine@wicare.org.sg to apply.

Information last updated on 10 Nov 2025
